method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: Shared zone 4 and 7 behavior supports similarity, but 1247 operates much longer daily distances and has a different purpose.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate-high correlation with overlapping dominant zones 4 and 7, though 1247 has much more zone activity.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, moderate age and kilometer similarity.

1311.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation and much higher route distances dominate over kilometer and duty-cycle similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative correlation; 1311 mainly uses zones 6 and 2, unlike 155's zones 4 and 7 emphasis.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, good kilometer similarity but weak age similarity.

1312.llm_rationale: Stop-zone pattern is fairly similar, but 1312 is a high-distance Production truck with much heavier zone 7 activity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate-high correlation driven by zones 4 and 7, but pass volume is far higher than 155.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, good kilometer similarity but weak age similarity.

1350.llm_rationale: Metadata matches well, but 1350 has much longer daily routes and broader zone coverage, so the statistical score is slightly overstated.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate correlation, but 1350 has far more passes and adds zones 6 and 8.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same Mobile_Eq purpose and MEDIUM duty cycle; age differs substantially while kilometers are moderately similar.

1363.llm_rationale: Despite metadata mismatch, 1363 has one of the closest daily-distance profiles and similar low-volume zone 2, 4, and 7 behavior.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate correlation with the same dominant zones, and zone volume is closer to 155 than many others.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, weak age and kilometer similarity.

1421.llm_rationale: Same purpose and duty cycle help, but route intensity, zone volume, and extra zones differ substantially from 155.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate-low correlation; both use zones 4 and 7, but 1421 also uses zones 6 and 8.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same Mobile_Eq purpose and MEDIUM duty cycle; age differs and kilometer similarity is moderate.

1423.llm_rationale: Behavior is weakly related: negative stop correlation, much longer daily routes, and different purpose.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative correlation; 1423 has low passes in zones 6 and 7 and no zone 4 activity.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, good kilometer similarity but weak age similarity.

1506.llm_rationale: Highest route-image similarity is not enough to offset zero stop correlation, different duty cycle, different purpose, and much higher speed.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Zero correlation; 1506 is dominated by zone 2 while 155 has sparse zones 2, 4, and 7.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Highest in the set but still low in absolute terms.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose and different AMBULANCE duty cycle, with weak age and kilometer similarity.

1575.llm_rationale: Good kilometer similarity and some stop-pattern overlap are outweighed by much longer daily distances and different purpose.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate correlation with shared zones 4 and 7, but 1575 has higher pass volume and zone 8 activity.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, very high kilometer similarity but weak age similarity.

1576.llm_rationale: Best overall metadata match and moderate stop-pattern match, but 1576 runs over twice the daily distance and has more zone activity than 155.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate-high correlation with overlapping zones 2, 4, and 7, though 1576 has much higher pass volume and zone 8 activity.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Very low representative route-image similarity, so route geometry support is weak.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same Mobile_Eq purpose and MEDIUM duty cycle; age and kilometer similarity are only moderate.

1578.llm_rationale: Stop-profile similarity is offset by very different route length and operating intensity; 1578 is a much higher-distance Production truck.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate-high correlation, mostly through zones 4 and 7, but 1578 has far heavier zone 7 activity.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, strong kilometer similarity but weak age similarity.

1667.llm_rationale: No meaningful stop-zone overlap and much higher speed and distance make behavior dissimilar despite same duty cycle.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Zero correlation; 1667 has no recorded zone passes while 155 has low but nonzero activity.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, moderate kilometer similarity but weak age similarity.

1687.llm_rationale: Daily distance and speed are fairly close to 155, but stop-profile correlation is only moderate and purpose differs.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate correlation with low pass volume, but 1687 lacks zone 4 activity.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low but slightly stronger than many other pairs.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, weak age and kilometer similarity.

1688.llm_rationale: Same purpose and duty cycle are outweighed by negative stop-profile correlation and different zone behavior.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative correlation; 1688 is concentrated in zone 2 while 155 is split across zones 2, 4, and 7.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low, though higher than most pairs here.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same Mobile_Eq purpose and MEDIUM duty cycle, but weak age and kilometer similarity.

1785.llm_rationale: Purpose matches, but stop profile, zone behavior, speed, and distance are quite different.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative correlation; 1785 is dominated by zone 3 rather than zones 4 and 7.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same Mobile_Eq purpose and MEDIUM duty cycle, with moderate kilometer similarity but weak age similarity.

1993.llm_rationale: Very strong stop-pattern alignment and similar dominant zones support similarity, but purpose mismatch and higher operating intensity limit the score.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High correlation with shared zones 2, 4, and 7, though 1993 has much more frequent zone passing.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, weak age and kilometer similarity.

2191.llm_rationale: Some stop-profile overlap exists, but 2191 has very high daily distance and heavy zone 7 usage unlike 155.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate correlation through zones 4 and 7, but pass intensity is much higher for 2191.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, good kilometer similarity but weak age similarity.

2201.llm_rationale: Similar zones and closer daily distance than most non-Mobile_Eq trucks make this comparable despite purpose and kilometer differences.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High correlation with the same zones 2, 4, and 7, though 2201 has more frequent passes.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low but among the stronger route similarities in this set.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, weak age and kilometer similarity.

2518.llm_rationale: Strong zone-overlap pattern is reduced by higher daily distance, much heavier zone 4 activity, and different purpose.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High correlation with zones 4 and 7, but 2518 has much greater pass volume and lacks zone 2.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Different purpose, same MEDIUM duty cycle, weak age and kilometer similarity.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
